question: Define an `Employee` base class with a `displayInfo()` method. Create a `Manager` class that inherits from `Employee` and overrides `displayInfo()` to include additional manager-specific details.

test_cases.expected:
--- Company Staff Information ---
Employee: Alice Smith, ID: EMP-001

Employee: Bob Johnson, ID: MGR-001
  Department: Engineering, Team Size: 12

Employee: Carol White, ID: MGR-002
  Department: Marketing, Team Size: 7

--- Individual Information ---
Employee: Alice Smith, ID: EMP-001
Employee: Bob Johnson, ID: MGR-001
  Department: Engineering, Team Size: 12
Employee: Carol White, ID: MGR-002
  Department: Marketing, Team Size: 7
